message:
chore: exclude Rust target/ directories from npm package

Reduces package size from 166.9 MB to 1.6 MB by excluding:
- reasoningbank/target/
- All Rust build artifacts (*.rlib, *.rmeta)
- Fixes E415 hardlink error during npm publish

files.patch:
@@ -68,3 +68,9 @@ bun.lockb
 test-output/
 coverage/
 .nyc_output/
+
+# Rust build artifacts (massive - exclude from npm)
+reasoningbank/target/
+**/target/
+*.rlib
+*.rmeta
